name: sls.tf-typescript-parser
description: TypeScript configuration parser for sls.tf Terraform module
comment: The SAM path (sam-preprocessor.js) uses a vendored, tree-shaken js-yaml committed under vendor/js-yaml/ and needs no install. Only the optional TypeScript-config path needs the runtime dependencies — run `npm install` in this directory before using config_format="typescript". js-yaml is a devDependency only: it is not needed at plan time (vendored), just for the offline elemental-to-serverless converter and re-vendoring.
author: sls.tf
